data.name: Naughty Doughy
data.detailed_description:
💗Naughty Doughy💗

There is more to this bakery than the scent of warm bread! Enroll three charming young ladies and turn your business endeavor into a maelstrom of experiences and emotions. Naughty doughy is a mix between visual novel and dating simulation, interspersed with a number of mini-games.

A new beginning

As the corporate career that your parents had pushed you into leaves you exhausted and depressed, you make the radical decision of giving it all up. You resettle in your home town and revive the family bakery.

Reality kicks in quick - the shop does not make enough money to keep going. As you start lamenting your poor decision-making skills, luck eventually comes through the front door: one, then two, then three charming young ladies cross your path and take interest in your business endeavor.

A maelstrom of experiences and emotions

The girls turn everything upside down. You juggle with their emotions, their aspirations and the interest that each of them starts taking in you - all while channeling their energy to attract clients and turn your shop into a success story.

Engage with them on a variety of topics to get to know them better. Treat them with compliments and rewards to build bonding. Uncover their stories and see what they are up to. Defuse interpersonal situations.

Knead those buns!

When the moment is right, take your skills from the kitchen to the bed as the girls crave for your expert hands. The game offers a number of fully animated sex scenes to unlock and revive at will.

A galore of mini-games

While the store runs, you will be offered to perform a number of small tasks here and there for chances to climb the ladder of efficiency and boost your stats.

Haruna - soft voice, bold heart

Haruna looks more shy, less self-confident than you would expect her to be with her cute face and her impressive curves. But is she really? She does know what she wants and how to get it. Learn her game, find out the motivations beyond her constant display of positive energy, and uncover the double life she's living.

Aoki - the tenderhearted tomboy

With her androgynous look and her strong display of self-confidence, Aoki is Haruna's opposite in almost every aspect, and yet they call themselves best friends. It may not be a balanced friendship, as Haruna gently submits to Aoki's overreaching lead. But Aoki's boldness hides a surprisingly soft personality once you find the path to her heart. Romance her, get her to open up and find out her story.

Yuna - the ideal elder sister

You know Yuna since childhood. You even had a secret crush on her, but you were too young for her at the time. Fate brings her back into your life when you are already busy with Haruna and Aoki, and yet you cannot pass on her. As much as she appears mature and easy-going, she is competing with both of them for your attention. Juggle with all three girls to keep things smooth and delightful!

data.short_description: There is more to this bakery than the scent of warm bread! Enroll three charming young ladies and turn your business endeavor into a maelstrom of experiences and emotions.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 泰文, 俄文, 日文, 韓文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or newer
  • 處理器: 64 bit Intel Core, AMD Ryzen
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DX10-capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOS 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Any Apple Silicon processor or any Intel processor from 2020 up
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 處理器: 64 bit Intel Core, AMD Ryzen
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any

Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 or newer
  • Processor: 64 bit Intel Core, AMD Ryzen
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DX10-capable GPU
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Any

Minimum:
  • OS: MacOS 11 or newer
  • Processor: Any Apple Silicon processor or any Intel processor from 2020 up
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Any
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Any

  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
